summary: Iteration 194 testing complete: Avatar Customization System. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Three-tab coven panel (Coven | Ranks | Avatar), avatar customizer with preview, name input, 10 color buttons, 12 symbol buttons, and save functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/auth/avatar returns 200 with avatar object, available_symbols (12), available_colors (10) - PASS
PUT /api/auth/avatar updates avatar color, symbol, display_name - PASS
PUT /api/auth/avatar validates invalid color (falls back to #FBBF24) - PASS
PUT /api/auth/avatar validates invalid symbol (falls back to 'star') - PASS
PUT /api/auth/avatar caps display_name at 20 characters - PASS
Avatar persists across requests (GET after PUT returns updated data) - PASS
Regression: POST /api/sync/covens creates coven with 8-char invite code - PASS
Frontend: /cosmic-map coven panel has three tabs (Coven, Ranks, Avatar) - PASS
Frontend: Avatar tab (data-testid=avatar-tab) opens avatar-customizer - PASS
Frontend: avatar-customizer has avatar-preview, avatar-name-input - PASS
Frontend: 10 color buttons with data-testid=avatar-color-{hex} - PASS
Frontend: 12 symbol buttons with data-testid=avatar-symbol-{name} - PASS
Frontend: save-avatar-btn saves avatar and shows 'Avatar updated' toast - PASS
seed_data_creation: Avatar data updated during tests (persisted to user profile)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 194 Avatar Customization System fully working. The avatar system includes GET /api/auth/avatar (returns current avatar + available_symbols/colors) and PUT /api/auth/avatar (updates avatar). Frontend has three-tab coven panel (Coven | Ranks | Avatar). Avatar tab shows AvatarCustomizer component with preview, name input (max 20 chars), 10 color swatches, 12 symbol buttons, and save button. Avatar data is stored in user document under 'avatar' field. WebSocket position broadcasts include avatar data for coven member markers.

backend_apis.GET /api/auth/avatar: Returns avatar object with color, symbol, display_name + available_symbols (12 items) + available_colors (10 items)
backend_apis.PUT /api/auth/avatar: Updates avatar with validation - invalid color defaults to #FBBF24, invalid symbol defaults to 'star', display_name capped at 20 chars

coven_panel_tabs.coven_tab: Shows coven details or create/join forms

avatar_customizer.avatar_preview: data-testid=avatar-preview - Shows current avatar with symbol and color
avatar_customizer.name_input: data-testid=avatar-name-input - Text input for display name (max 20 chars)
avatar_customizer.symbol_buttons: data-testid=avatar-symbol-{name} - 12 symbol options (lotus, star, moon, sun, flame, leaf, crystal, feather, spiral, eye, wave, mountain)
avatar_customizer.save_button: data-testid=save-avatar-btn - Saves avatar and shows toast
